content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the loop of homogeneous incorrect self-feedback that plagues current unsupervised iterative refinement. This creates a "self-critical jury system" for LLM outputs where contradictory perspectives from the same model expose hidden flaws that single-perspective self-feedback would miss, without requiring additional training or external supervision.
